sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56724" key="kerannute/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερανν-υτέον</orth>, <sense id="n56724.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must mix</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:5:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
